results.code:

67         hybrid_query = f"""
68         WITH vector_search AS (
69             {vector_query}
70         ),
71         fulltext_search AS (
72             {fulltext_query}
73         )
74         SELECT
75             COALESCE(vector_search.id, fulltext_search.id) AS id,
76             COALESCE(1.0 / (:k + vector_search.rank), 0.0) +
77             COALESCE(1.0 / (:k + fulltext_search.rank), 0.0) AS score
78         FROM vector_search
79         FULL OUTER JOIN fulltext_search ON vector_search.id = fulltext_search.id
80         ORDER BY score DESC
81         LIMIT 20
82         """
83
